top_findings.summary: The skill description in SKILL.md presents a local note-taking app for managing personal notes, todos, and events. However, the references (WORKFLOWS.md, TROUBLESHOOTING.md, COMMANDS.md) reveal that the same `mem` command also indexes and searches the user's Claude conversation data (from ~/.claude/projects/, ~/.claude/handoffs/, etc.) and uses an Anthropic API key for LLM extraction. This functionality is not disclosed in the main description and goes beyond the stated purpose of managing notes, todos, and events. It accesses sensitive user data (Claude conversations) and performs actions (LLM extraction) that are excessive and unrelated to the stated purpose.
